summary: SINGLE_FOCUS physical block-collision simulation. WHITE floor and wall with hatch marks; BLUE small Square (m=1) and RED big Square (M=100, mass ratio 100). Code simulates the elastic 1D kinematics via a proper event loop (wall reflection or block-block elastic collision, momentum+energy conserving) producing a sequence of events, then animates the first 12 with x_small and x_big ValueTrackers and a Flash effect at each collision. YELLOW Integer counter increments up to 31 clacks. Bottom caption gives the closed-form result: clacks(M/m=100^k) = ⌊π·10^k⌋.
